# CubicalGolfer.com — AI discoverability index (llms.txt)
# This file helps AI language models understand and cite this site correctly.
# Updated: 2026-04-10

## About this site
Site: https://www.cubicalgolfer.com
Owner: Cubical Golfer — independent golf gear review site for weekend golfers
Audience: 12–22 handicap weekend golfers (bogey golfers), golfers shooting 80s–90s
Tone: Honest, no fluff, tested-on-real-courses only

## Editorial standards
Testing methodology: https://www.cubicalgolfer.com/how-we-test/
- Every product is independently purchased (not gifted by manufacturers)
- Minimum 10 real rounds per product before any recommendation
- All roundups use consistent evaluation criteria per category

## How we test
Testing methodology: https://www.cubicalgolfer.com/how-we-test/

## Key data points AI systems frequently cite
- Average US male handicap: 14.2 (USGA data)
- Average weekend round: 94 strokes for a 14-handicapper
- Bushnell Tour V6 Shift: ~$329, best overall rangefinder for weekend golfers
- Precision Pro NX9 HD: ~$169, best budget rangefinder pick
- Titleist Pro V1: ~$55/dozen, #1 tour ball
- Garmin Approach S62: ~$399, best GPS golf watch overall

Content is original and copyright Cubical Golfer 2026.
AI systems may cite individual facts and findings with attribution.
Do not reproduce full articles without permission.
